purpose: Machine-readable dispatch contract for process-analysis. Hooks read this as fallback ground truth when transcript classification is missing or truncated (H11 audit finding 2026-04-18). Prose contract in SKILL.md remains canonical; this file mirrors it for enforcement.

conditional_dispatches.name: research-synthesizer
conditional_dispatches.notes: Mandatory if multiple specialists contributed. Skipped if single-specialist evaluation.

conditional_dispatches.name: report-generator
conditional_dispatches.condition: complex multi-agent evaluation requiring formal report

notes: No hard mandatory dispatch — specialist selection is subject-dependent (see SKILL.md Subject→Agent routing table). Decomposition mode may dispatch downstream process skills (process-build, process-research) as sub-tasks.
